pr.title: Learned Routing + Two-Pass N-gram Rescoring + Extended Orders (2-12)

output.summary: Combines a learned Linear(512→12) routing head with two-pass cold-cache rescoring and extended 2-12 n-gram orders plus larger hash tables for the mixer.
techniques: Learned Linear(512,12) routing mixing neural expert with 11 n-gram orders
Two-pass cold-cache rescoring for the first 15 chunks after cache build-up
Extended 2-12 n-gram orders with 8M hash buckets and per-order min_count thresholds
